CustomField.formula: OR( CONTAINS(Owner:Queue.QueueName, "אשדוד"), CONTAINS(Owner:Queue.QueueName, "חיפה"), CONTAINS(Owner:Queue.QueueName, "רמת החייל"), CONTAINS(Owner:Queue.QueueName, "רעננה"), CONTAINS(Owner:Queue.QueueName, "ראשון"), CONTAINS(Owner:Queue.QueueName, "באר שבע"), CONTAINS(Owner:Queue.QueueName, "ניידת"), CONTAINS(Owner:Queue.QueueName, "חולון"), CONTAINS(Owner:Queue.QueueName, "השלום") ) && NOT( CONTAINS(Owner:Queue.QueueName, "ציבורי") )
CustomField.label: Case Owned by Department Queue
